yes. can you explain galvanic cell more? जिसकी वजह से यहां neutrality maintain है।

A galvanic cell generates electricity through a chemical reaction, where oxidation and reduction occur in separate compartments. This setup maintains neutrality by balancing charges; as electrons flow from the anode to the cathode, ions move in the electrolyte to keep things balanced.
